request.description:
Update an API Token. The API Token created must use a subset of permissions the API token creating them.

This endpoint consumes 10 units of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- api-tokens:create

request.description:
Create an API Token. The API Token created must use a subset of permissions the API token creating them.

This endpoint consumes 10 units of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- api-tokens:create

response.name: The newly created api token with its stable UUID and hash.
